calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Petitioner'S Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kelly T. Boruszewski, Esq., (415)296-7070 of Weisber & Miller for Plaintiff/Opposing party Richard De Nola.

Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: RESPONDENT KATHLEEN CAPPETTI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Petitioner'S Service Of Summons
is DENIED. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration A Ward
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kelly T. Boruszewski, Esq., (415)296-7070 of Weisber & Miller for Plaintiff/Opposing party Richard De Nola.

Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER RICHARD DE NOLA Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration A Ward is GRANTED. Order and judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration A Ward
Off Calendar Sep-29-2015 Continued To Oct-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Eisberg, Esq.(415-296-7070) of Weisberg & Miller for Petitioner/Moving party RICHARD DE NOLA.
Juliana Pisan, Esq. (415-296-0900 ext 28) of Sheppard, Rosen Uziel & Sussman specially appearing for Respondent/opposing party Kathleen Cappetti.

The Court orders Defendant's counsel to file her substitution. Defendant argues an opposition has been filed to petitioner's motion. Plaintiff argues. The Court looks and retains filed papers of Defendant in Open Court. Notice is not proper. Defendant argues notice was never properly served. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER RICHARD DE NOLA's Petitioners Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration Award is taken under submission. Plaintiff submits a proposed order and judgment. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration A Ward
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Continued To Sep-28-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER RICHARD DE NOLA's Petitioners Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration Award is continued to September 28, 2015 for moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the Petition (referenced in the points and authorities 1:14-23). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Petitioners Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Respondent And Rachel Emigh In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: RESPONDENT KATHLEEN CAPPETTI's Motion To Quash Petitioners Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Respondent And Rachel Emigh In Support Thereof is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
